overview: Goblin Warrior is a Normal-class Humanoid/Beast monster found in Goblin Cave. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 44 HP, 24 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 6 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Counter Attack at 160% ratio (384 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Counter Attack.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Counter Attack
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Counter Attack. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Counter Attack

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
